headlines.headline: Holtar Stores sees 15% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 15% drop in new customer orders indicates a significant decline in growth momentum that will likely weigh on investor sentiment.

sentiment.reasoning: Losing a key contract to a competitor directly impacts revenue and suggests potential competitive weakness.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
